Name: Toby
Message: Coach I keep slipping on the North Pitch during passing drills.

Name: Coach Miller
Message: Did you check your studs Toby? The standard equipment guide says to use 13mm studs for training.

Name: Carlos
Message: Coach, 13mm isn't going to work on the North Pitch today.

Name: Coach Miller
Message: Why not? It hasn't rained in two days.

Name: Carlos
Message: The groundskeeper always over-waters the left flank of the North Pitch on Thursdays. It's basically a swamp over there.

Name: Carlos
Message: You need the 15mm soft-ground studs. Unwritten rule of the North Pitch.

Name: Jamie
Message: Honestly just wrap your boots in duct tape. Gives you way more grip.

Name: Carlos
Message: Jamie is an idiot, Toby. Don't put tape on your boots. He's joking.

Name: Coach Miller
Message: Alright, everyone switch to 15mm if you're playing the left wing. I'll talk to the groundskeeper about the sprinkler timers.

Name: Toby
Message: My right hamstring feels a bit tight after that last sprint.

Name: Jamie
Message: You should probably retire. It's over for you.

Name: Carlos
Message: Stop messing with the kid, Jamie. Toby, go see the physio and ask for the deep-tissue roller.

Name: Toby
Message: Thanks Carlos. Is the physio in the main building?

Name: Coach Miller
Message: Yes second door on the left.

Name: Jamie
Message: Can we end practice early? I want to go play FIFA.

Name: Coach Miller
Message: We end when the drills are done, Jamie. Focus up.

Name: Carlos
Message: If Jamie spent as much time practicing as he did playing video games, he might actually make the starting lineup.
